_hinweis: Copy this file to config.json and adjust it. Do NOT commit real secrets. The actions server (tools/action-server.py) reads frontend/config.json at startup.
_allowed_domains_hinweis: Empty list = NO domain restriction (default; public hosts only, SSRF protection remains). OPENING websites (open_url) is always allowed. Only fill this in if server-side reading/automation (browse_page/browser_act) should deliberately be restricted to specific domains, e.g. ["*.wikipedia.org", "*.github.com"].
_vision_hinweis: Ollama model for screen vision (see_screen). Default: qwen2.5vl:7b (pulled by setup.bat). More VRAM? qwen2.5vl:32b is significantly better.
_whisper_hinweis: Local speech recognition (tools/stt-server.py, faster-whisper). model_size: tiny|base|small|medium|large-v3. device: auto|cpu|cuda (auto = GPU if available). language: null = automatic detection, otherwise e.g. "de". Model is downloaded automatically on first use.
_workspace_hinweis: Working folder for file creation, project scaffolding and execution (write_file/read_file/list_workspace/create_project/run_command/run_file/open_path). Relative paths are ALWAYS relative to this folder (path-traversal protection; no escape via '..'). Absolute paths are allowed but are considered sensitive and require confirmation. Created at startup if it does not exist. Empty/omitted = ~/OddvarkWorkspace.
